# Drive the prune confirm modal end-to-end. With CANOPY_DEMO=1 the actual
# `git worktree remove` is soft-gated so this is safe even outside the
# sandbox tmpdir.
width 140
height 40
wait 200ms
keys j
keys d
capture /tmp/canopy-demo-prune-confirm.txt
keys y
wait 100ms
capture /tmp/canopy-demo-prune-after.txt
